checklist: Utilize priority queues for top-k selections
Analyze heap element insertions O(log N)

states.question: What is the time complexity of building a heap from an unsorted array of size N?
states.explanation: Using bottom-up heapification (sift-down on internal nodes), building a heap of size N takes linear O(N) time.

states.analogy_description: Patients enter the ER with urgency priorities. The doctor treats the most critical patient first (max priority extraction), regardless of who arrived first.

whiteboard_data.title: Min-Heap Heapify Up
whiteboard_data.description: Swapping nodes to maintain parent <= children constraints.

steps.details: Adding 3 as leaf node of parent 12

states.prompt: Explain Heapsort / Priority Queues in your own words to a peer. Use an analogy from daily life.

flashcards.front: What is the worst-case complexity of Heapsort?
flashcards.back: O(N log N) in all cases (best, worst, average).

flashcards.front: What are the parent/child index equations for a heap stored in an array at index i?
